$comment: Risk feed registry. RFP §4 list is illustrative; this is our proposed registry. accessibility is our working classification — entries marked verified:false are pending first-hand verification (SAT-302).

feeds.name: DeFiScan
feeds.focus: Decentralization maturity framework: who controls keys, upgrades, and admin powers

accessibility.note: Open-source repo (deficollective/defiscan) + public API docs (docs.defiscan.info); synced via scripts/sync-defiscan.mjs.

coverageBlocker.note: DeFiScan reviews protocols one by one; uncovered protocols have no published review yet. Unblock: request a review upstream (open process) — nothing on our side.

feeds.name: CuratorWatch
feeds.focus: Vault-level risk monitoring for Morpho curators, tracking allocation risk and curator behavior

accessibility.note: Public dashboard; API availability to verify

coverageBlocker.note: CuratorWatch monitors the Morpho curator/vault ecosystem only; most seed protocols are outside its scope by design. Unblock: not applicable beyond Morpho-family rows.

feeds.name: BlockAnalitica
feeds.focus: Quantitative on-chain risk modeling for lending markets: liquidations, collateral health, market exposure. Publishes a public Morpho risk dashboard (morpho.blockanalitica.com); bespoke modeling for other protocols (Sky/Aave) is delivered privately

accessibility.note: Public Morpho risk dashboard (morpho.blockanalitica.com). API and methodology openness for other coverage not verified first-hand.

coverageBlocker.note: Morpho coverage is via the public dashboard (morpho.blockanalitica.com); verbatim transcription pending a parser + first-hand verification. Non-Morpho bespoke modeling stays private (outreach via EF App Relations, SAT-305).

feeds.name: DeFiPunk'd
feeds.focus: Multi-dimension risk registry: Control, Exit, Autonomy, Open Access, Verifiability via distributed LLM consensus

accessibility.note: Public site live (defipunkd.com). API docs and methodology openness not yet verified first-hand (SAT-302).

coverageBlocker.note: Registry/API availability not yet verified first-hand. Unblock: our verification work (SAT-302).

feeds.name: Pharos
feeds.focus: Real-time risk monitoring and automated alerts for live protocol risk events

accessibility.note: Alert product; public feed availability to verify

coverageBlocker.note: Real-time alerting product; no public event feed confirmed. Unblock: determine access model and request a feed/webhook (SAT-308).

feeds.name: Credora
feeds.focus: Institutional-grade credit risk ratings for DeFi protocols and borrowers

accessibility.note: Institutional product; expect gated, manual curation with permission

coverageBlocker.note: Institutional product; redistribution of ratings requires an agreement. Unblock: data agreement (SAT-307).

feeds.name: pigi.finance
feeds.focus: Vault analytics and risk-adjusted yield comparison across 50+ protocols. Tracks historical exploits, holder concentration, and risk-adjusted APY

accessibility.note: Public dashboard; API availability to verify

coverageBlocker.note: Public dashboard; API availability unverified. Vault-focused scope. Unblock: SAT-302.

feeds.name: Xerberus
feeds.focus: Independent risk rating protocol for DeFi vaults. 300+ subscores across 85+ mechanisms. Investor-focused and open-source

accessibility.note: Methodology published openly (publish.obsidian.md/xerberus). API/dashboard access not yet verified first-hand (SAT-302).

coverageBlocker.note: API-first positioning unverified; vault-focused scope. Unblock: SAT-302.

feeds.name: Zyfai Risk
feeds.focus: Real-time risk score dashboard for DeFi liquidity pools. Tracks risk metrics, TVL, APY, and security grades across pools

accessibility.note: Public dashboard; API availability to verify

coverageBlocker.note: Pool-level dashboard; API unverified. Unblock: SAT-302.

feeds.name: LlamaRisk
feeds.focus: Protocol risk research and parameter recommendations for DeFi. Analytics and monitoring focused on collateral and governance risk

accessibility.note: Public research reports; structured data to verify

coverageBlocker.note: Public research reports; structured-data availability unverified. Unblock: SAT-302.

feeds.name: Philidor Analytics
feeds.focus: Deterministic vault risk scoring across 700+ vaults. Three-vector framework: asset quality, platform code maturity, and governance controls. Open methodology

accessibility.note: Open methodology, deterministic outputs; endpoint to verify

coverageBlocker.note: Open methodology, deterministic outputs claimed; endpoint unverified. Vault-focused scope. Unblock: SAT-302.
